testcase.name: AI generates casual tone message for Craigslist listing
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "CRAIGSLIST" with title "Vintage Record Player" priced at 75..passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message has a "casual" tone..............................passed And the generated message platform is "CRAIGSLIST"..........................passed

testcase.name: AI generates professional tone message for eBay listing
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "EBAY" with title "Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones" priced at 200..passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message has a "professional" tone........................passed And the generated message platform is "EBAY"................................passed

testcase.name: AI generates friendly tone message for Facebook listing
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "FACEBOOK" with title "IKEA Standing Desk" priced at 150..passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message has a "friendly" tone............................passed And the generated message platform is "FACEBOOK"............................passed

testcase.name: Generated message includes seller name when available
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "CRAIGSLIST" with title "Leather Couch" priced at 300....passed And the seller name is "Mike"...............................................passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message body references the seller "Mike"................passed

testcase.name: AI generates professional tone message for Mercari listing
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "MERCARI" with title "Nintendo Switch OLED" priced at 250..passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message has a "professional" tone........................passed

testcase.name: AI generates casual tone message for OfferUp listing
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "OFFERUP" with title "Mountain Bike 26 inch" priced at 180..passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message has a "casual" tone..............................passed

testcase.name: AI generates inquiry message type
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "EBAY" with title "Canon EOS R5 Camera" priced at 2500...passed When the message generator creates a "inquiry" message......................passed Then the generated message type is "inquiry"................................passed And the generated message contains a subject line...........................passed And the generated message contains a body...................................passed

testcase.name: AI generates negotiation message type
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "MERCARI" with title "Air Jordan 1 Retro" priced at 300..passed And the buyer offers 250....................................................passed When the message generator creates a "negotiation" message..................passed Then the generated message type is "negotiation"............................passed And the generated message contains a subject line...........................passed

testcase.name: AI generates follow-up message type
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "FACEBOOK" with title "KitchenAid Mixer" priced at 150...passed When the message generator creates a "follow-up" message....................passed Then the generated message type is "follow-up"..............................passed And the generated message contains a subject line...........................passed

testcase.name: AI generates offer message type with price
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "CRAIGSLIST" with title "MacBook Pro M3" priced at 1200..passed And the buyer offers 1000...................................................passed When the message generator creates a "offer" message........................passed Then the generated message type is "offer"..................................passed And the generated message contains a subject line...........................passed And the generated message contains a body...................................passed

testcase.name: Template fallback when AI API is unavailable
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "CRAIGSLIST" with title "Vintage Turntable" priced at 100..passed And the AI API is unavailable...............................................passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message is a fallback template...........................passed And the generated message contains a subject line...........................passed And the generated message contains a body...................................passed

testcase.name: Generated message is returned as editable draft
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "EBAY" with title "Bose QuietComfort Ultra" priced at 280..passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message has a non-empty subject..........................passed And the generated message has a non-empty body..............................passed And the generated message can be edited before sending......................passed

testcase.name: API creates message record with DRAFT status
testcase.system-out: Given the message generation API endpoint exists at "app/api/messages/generate/route.ts"..passed Then the route creates messages with initial status "DRAFT".................passed And the route sets direction to "OUTBOUND"..................................passed

testcase.name: Template fallback includes placeholder fields for offer price
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "OFFERUP" with title "iPad Pro 12.9" priced at 600.......passed And the AI API is unavailable...............................................passed When the message generator creates a "offer" message........................passed Then the generated message is a fallback template...........................passed And the generated message body contains a price placeholder.................passed

testcase.name: Template fallback produces platform-appropriate tone
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "EBAY" with title "Dyson V15 Vacuum" priced at 400.......passed And the AI API is unavailable...............................................passed When the message generator creates a purchase message.......................passed Then the generated message is a fallback template...........................passed And the generated message has a "professional" tone.........................passed

testcase.name: Template fallback supports all message types
testcase.system-out: Given a listing on "FACEBOOK" with title "Herman Miller Chair" priced at 500..passed And the AI API is unavailable...............................................passed When the message generator creates a "offer" message........................passed Then the generated message is a fallback template...........................passed And the generated message type is "offer"...................................passed
